SEARCH
Package com.comp2042.model.mode

Class LevelManager

java.lang.Object
com.comp2042.model.mode.LevelManager
public class LevelManager extends Object
Singleton managing themed levels with progression and persistence (Singleton Pattern). Handles level initialization, tracks player progress, unlocks levels, and saves/loads state. Supports Additions (25%) - New Playable Levels requirement.

  • Method Details

    • getInstance

      public static LevelManager getInstance()
      Gets the singleton instance.
      Returns:
      the LevelManager instance

    • getAllLevels

      public List<LevelMode> getAllLevels()
      Gets all levels.
      Returns:
      unmodifiable list of levels

    • getLevel

      public LevelMode getLevel(int levelId)
      Gets a level by its ID (1-based).
      Parameters:
      levelId - the level ID
      Returns:
      the level, or null if not found

    • getCurrentLevel

      public LevelMode getCurrentLevel()
      Gets the current level being played.
      Returns:
      the current level, or null if none selected

    • setCurrentLevel

      public void setCurrentLevel(LevelMode level)
      Sets the current level.
      Parameters:
      level - the level to set as current

    • setCurrentLevel

      public boolean setCurrentLevel(int levelId)
      Sets the current level by ID.
      Parameters:
      levelId - the level ID (1-based)
      Returns:
      true if successful, false if invalid ID or level locked

    • completeLevel

      public boolean[] completeLevel(int levelId, int score, int linesCleared, long completionTimeMillis, boolean success)
      Completes a level with the given performance. Updates best scores and unlocks next level if applicable. Directly supports Additions (25%) - New Playable Levels.
      Parameters:
      levelId - the completed level ID
      score - the final score
      linesCleared - the number of lines cleared
      completionTimeMillis - the completion time in milliseconds
      success - whether the level was completed successfully
      Returns:
      an array of two booleans: [isNewBestScore, isNewBestTime]

    • unlockLevel

      public void unlockLevel(int levelId)
      Manually unlocks a level.

      WARNING: This method is intended for testing and debugging purposes only. It bypasses the normal level progression system and should not be called from production code. All calls to this method are logged for security auditing purposes.

      Security Note: This method is not accessible through the user interface and has no keyboard shortcuts or other user-accessible entry points. It is only used by unit tests to set up test scenarios.

      Parameters:
      levelId - the level ID to unlock (1-based)

      Note: This method is part of the testing API and should not be used in production code. Use completeLevel(int, int, int, long, boolean) for normal level progression.

    • isLevelCompleted

      public boolean isLevelCompleted(int levelId)
      Checks if a level is completed.
      Parameters:
      levelId - the level ID
      Returns:
      true if completed (1+ stars)

    • getTotalStars

      public int getTotalStars()
      Gets the total number of stars earned across all levels.
      Returns:
      total stars

    • getTotalLevels

      public int getTotalLevels()
      Gets the total number of levels.
      Returns:
      number of levels

    • getCompletedLevelsCount

      public int getCompletedLevelsCount()
      Gets the number of completed levels.
      Returns:
      number of completed levels

    • resetProgress

      public void resetProgress()
      Resets all level progress (for testing). Directly supports Basic Maintenance (35%) - deleting unused resources.

    • clearAllData

      public void clearAllData()
      Clears all level progress data and deletes the progress file. This completely removes the level progress persistence file. Directly supports Basic Maintenance (35%) - deleting unused resources.
